description: It's femininty celebrated and enhanced with this pair of slippers from Inc. 5. With it's sleek design and simple style, this pair works great both as an office wear and for parties. This pair comes with a shoe bag that helps you carry it around in ease. Upper Raw silk thong-styled strap with a toe separator Velcro closures for the forefoot toe separator strap to adjust midfoot Fit, and at the back strap Elasticated midfoot strap for enhanced comfort Synthetic leather foam footbed and padded at the ankle for all-day cushioned comfort Outsole Durable rubber outsole with herringbone grooves on the forefoot and horizontal grooves on the mildly raised heel for ultimate grip and traction Sandal care Use a soft bristle brush to dust the upper Do not wash or store in direct sunlight
